hero_subtitle: A comprehensive service platform for Indonesians living in Korea
about_mission: We strive to be a warm home for Indonesians in Korea
about_desc: WARCOP is a comprehensive service platform for Indonesians living in Korea. From authentic Indonesian cuisine to community services, visa consultation, and marketplace — we support every aspect of life abroad.
svc1_desc: Authentic Indonesian cuisine. Experience the taste of home right here in Korea.
svc2_desc: Restaurant ordering, community, and information hub — all in one. Coming soon.
svc3_desc: Visa & labor consultation, marketplace, and Indonesian community services.
address: 2F, 455 Jungang-daero, Danwon-gu, Ansan-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea
contact_desc: Feel free to reach out anytime with your questions.
privacy_intro: WARCOP respects your privacy and complies with applicable data protection laws including the Korean Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA).
privacy_s1_body:
We collect the following to provide our services:
• Account: Name, email, profile photo (via Google OAuth)
• Contact: Phone number
• Location: Delivery address, real-time GPS (during delivery only)
• Orders: Delivery address, payment history, menu items
• User content: Review photos, marketplace product photos
• Device: FCM push tokens (for notifications)
• Communications: 1:1 marketplace chat messages
• AI Chat: Chatbot conversation history (for service improvement)
privacy_s2_body:
• Service delivery (orders, delivery, payment)
• Notifications (order status, promotions)
• Customer support and dispute resolution
• Service quality improvement and AI model training
• Legal compliance
privacy_s3_body:
Data is deleted immediately upon account deletion. Exceptions required by law:
• Payment records: 5 years (Korean E-Commerce Act)
• Consumer complaints/disputes: 3 years
• Access logs: 3 months (Korean Communications Privacy Act)
privacy_s4_body:
We do not share your data with third parties, except:
• Google (OAuth authentication)
• Firebase (push notification delivery)
• Law enforcement upon valid legal request
privacy_s5_body:
• Supabase Inc. — Database/Storage/Edge Functions (overseas transfer)
• Google LLC — Gemini AI chatbot (overseas transfer)
• Naver Cloud — Maps API (domestic)
privacy_s6_body:
You have the right to access, correct, delete, and restrict processing of your data:
• In-app: Profile → 'Delete My Account'
• Web: /delete-account page
• Email: dev@warcop.kr
privacy_s7_body:
• Name: Seola Yoon
• Email: dev@warcop.kr
• Phone: +82-10-4188-6707
• Response time: Within 30 days of request
privacy_s8_body:
• Company: WARCOP
• CEO: Seola Yoon
• Business Registration: 695-37-01477
• Address: 2F, 455 Jungang-daero, Danwon-gu, Ansan-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea
• Customer Service: dev@warcop.kr / +82-10-4188-6707
terms_effective: Effective Date: May 14, 2026 · Last Updated: May 14, 2026
terms_intro: These Terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between WARCOP (the 'Company') and users in connection with the use of the mobile application service (the 'Service') provided by the Company.
terms_s1_body: These Terms govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between WARCOP (the 'Company') and users in connection with the use of the mobile application service (the 'Service') provided by the Company.
terms_s2_body:
1. 'Service': All services available through the mobile application provided by the Company, including restaurant menu ordering & delivery, community (secondhand marketplace & forum), AI chatbot consultation, and the like.
2. 'User': Members and non-members who use the Service in accordance with these Terms.
3. 'Member': A person who has registered as a member by providing personal information to the Company and may use the Service on an ongoing basis.
4. 'Posting': All information posted by a member while using the Service, including text, photos, videos, and comments.
5. 'UGC (User Generated Content)': All content created directly by users and posted on the Service.
terms_s3_body:
1. These Terms take effect by being posted on the Service screen or otherwise notified to users.
2. The Company may amend these Terms within the scope that does not violate applicable laws.
3. If the Terms are amended, the effective date and reason for the change will be announced through in-Service notices, together with the current Terms, from 7 days prior to the effective date.
terms_s4_body:
[Membership Registration]
• A user applies for membership registration by entering member information in the form prescribed by the Company and agreeing to these Terms.
• The Company approves registration unless using another's identity, entering false information, or other cases deemed inappropriate.

[Membership Withdrawal]
• A member may withdraw at any time through the [Profile > Settings > Withdraw Membership] menu in the app.
• Upon withdrawal, personal information is processed in accordance with the 'Privacy Policy.'
• Postings may not be deleted after withdrawal; if deletion is desired, the member must delete them directly before withdrawal.
terms_s5_body:
The Company provides the following services.
1. Food Ordering & Delivery Service: Menu browsing, cart, order intake, delivery tracking
2. Community Service: Secondhand marketplace, open forum, chat
3. AI Chatbot Consultation Service: General consultation (Sahabat WARCOP), labor & administrative consultation, visa guidance
4. Point & Cash Service: Top-up, payment, accrual
5. Other Services: Services developed by the Company in the future or provided through partnerships

The Company may change the Service for operational or technical needs and will announce such changes before they take effect.
terms_s6_body:
1. The Service is, in principle, provided 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.
2. However, the Service may be suspended for unavoidable reasons such as regular system maintenance, emergency repairs, or natural disasters.
3. The operating hours of the delivery service follow the business hours of the restaurant.
terms_s7_body:
Users must not engage in the following acts.
1. Stealing another person's personal information
2. Using the Company's Service to engage in acts prohibited by law or these Terms
3. Interfering with the stable operation of the Service
4. Harassment, threats, or hate speech against other users
5. Using the Service for commercial purposes without authorization
6. Other illegal or improper acts
terms_s8_title: Article 8 (UGC Policy - User Generated Content Management)
terms_s8_body:
[Responsibility for Postings]
Responsibility for all content (text, images, videos, etc.) posted by a user lies with the posting user. The Company may delete or restrict postings without prior notice if the content falls under the prohibited items below.

[Prohibited Content]
(1) Illegal goods trading: narcotics & illegal drugs, counterfeit currency & IDs, stolen & smuggled goods, firearms·weapons·explosives, and other goods whose trading is prohibited by Korean law
(2) Hate speech and discrimination: hate speech based on race·ethnicity·nationality·religion·gender·sexual orientation·disability, incitement of violence, bullying·threats·intimidation, defamation
(3) Obscene and sexual content: explicit sexual content·pornography, Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM, immediate deletion and reporting to authorities), solicitation·advertising of prostitution, illegally filmed material
(4) Fraud and deception: fake listings, phishing·smishing, false reviews·manipulated ratings, multi-level marketing·illegal financial products
(5) Intellectual property infringement: infringement of another's copyright·trademark·patent, unauthorized reproduction·plagiarized content
(6) Personal information disclosure: disclosing another's personal information (real name·phone·address·photos) without consent

[Rights to Postings]
Copyright in postings belongs to the posting user. The Company may use postings for Service operation, improvement, and promotion, in which case it shall obtain the poster's consent.
terms_s9_body:
[Reporting Procedure]
When an inappropriate posting or user is discovered, it may be reported immediately through:
• In-App Report: Tap the [Report] button on the posting or user profile
• Email Report: dev@warcop.kr (with screenshots)
• Report Types: illegal trading, hate speech, obscene content, fraud, spam, personal information infringement, etc.

[Processing Procedure]
• Stage 1: Report received and automatic confirmation notice sent — immediately
• Stage 2: Internal review and policy violation determination — within 24 hours of receipt
• Stage 3: Action taken (deletion·warning·suspension·permanent ban) — immediately after determination
• Stage 4: Result notified to reporter and reported party — within 48 hours of action

[Sanctions]
• 1st: Posting deletion + written warning
• 2nd: Posting deletion + 7-day suspension
• 3rd: Posting deletion + 30-day suspension
• 4th or more, or serious violation: permanent account ban
• Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM): immediate permanent ban + reporting to authorities

[Blocking Function]
Users may directly block other users; postings and messages from blocked users will no longer be displayed. (In-app [User Profile > Block])

[Appeals]
A user who objects to an action may file an appeal by email (dev@warcop.kr) within 7 days from receiving the notice; the Company will notify the re-review result within 14 days from receipt.
terms_s10_body:
[Nature of the Service]
The WARCOP AI chatbots (Sahabat WARCOP, labor consultation bot, visa guide bot) are AI-based information provision services and do not replace professional legal advice, medical diagnosis, or official administrative services.

[Disclaimers]
1. Exemption from Legal Liability: AI chatbot responses are for general information and have no legal effect. Labor and visa responses are for reference only.
2. Exemption from Medical Liability: The AI chatbot is not a medical professional. Health or psychological responses do not replace diagnosis and treatment by a medical professional; in an emergency, contact 119 or a medical institution immediately.
3. Information Accuracy: AI responses are based on trained data and may not reflect the latest legal changes or the particularities of individual cases. Be sure to consult a relevant professional before making important decisions.
4. Damages: The Company is not responsible for any direct or indirect damages arising from reliance on AI chatbot responses.

[Recommendations]
• Labor & administrative: Ministry of Employment and Labor (1350), Foreign Workers Support Center (1644-0644)
• Visa & immigration: Korea Immigration Service (1345)
• Medical: nearby hospital or emergency medical service (119)
• Psychological crisis: Suicide Prevention Counseling Hotline (1393), Mental Health Crisis Counseling Hotline (1577-0199)
terms_s11_body:
[Payment Methods]
• The Company uses its own payment system (Smart Jump bank transfer).
• Payment is available through Cash top-up and point accrual.

[Refund Policy]
• Cancellation before order intake: full refund
• Cancellation after cooking begins: no refund (however, exchange or refund in case of food defects)
• After delivery completion: handled through customer service in case of food defects
terms_s12_body:
1. The Company is exempt from liability if it cannot provide the Service due to force majeure such as natural disasters, war, or service suspension by telecommunications carriers.
2. The Company is not responsible for Service usage disruptions caused by the user's fault.
3. The Company acts only as an intermediary in transactions between users or between a user and a third party (such as the secondhand marketplace) and bears no direct responsibility.
terms_s13_body:
1. Copyright and intellectual property rights to the Service belong to the Company.
2. Users may not commercially use, or provide to third parties, information obtained through the Company's Service without the Company's prior approval.
terms_s14_body:
1. Disputes arising between the Company and a user in connection with the use of the Service shall be resolved through mutual consultation.
2. If consultation is not reached, the competent court shall be the court of jurisdiction under the Civil Procedure Act.
3. The interpretation and application of these Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea.
terms_s15_body:
1. Matters not specified in these Terms shall follow applicable laws and commercial practices.
2. Even if some provisions of these Terms become invalid, the remaining provisions remain valid.
terms_addendum_body:
These Terms take effect on May 14, 2026.

WARCOP | 2F, 455 Jungang-daero, Danwon-gu, Ansan-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea
Email: dev@warcop.kr
delete_intro: You can request deletion of your WARCOP account and associated data. Requests are processed within 30 days.
delete_method_app: ① In-app: Profile → 'Delete My Account' menu
delete_method_web: ② Web: Fill out the form below
delete_method_email: ③ Email: Send request directly to dev@warcop.kr
delete_data_list:
• Account information (name, email, profile, phone)
• Order & payment history (anonymized, kept for 5 years)
• Reviews, comments, marketplace posts
• 1:1 chat messages
• AI chatbot conversation history
• FCM push tokens
• Delivery addresses
delete_retain_list:
• E-Commerce Act: Payment records for 5 years (anonymized)
• Tax Law: Tax invoices/receipts for 5 years
• Consumer Disputes: Complaint records for 3 years
delete_reason_placeholder: Tell us why (helps us improve our service)
delete_success: Request received. We will respond within 30 days via email.
delete_error: Submission failed. Please try again or email dev@warcop.kr directly.
delete_duplicate: A request is already being processed. We will respond within 30 days.
delete_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
